outputs.name: des_loop
outputs.description:
A Dragonfly Thermal Loop object possessing all infrastructure for a
District Energy Simulation (DES) simulation. This should be connected
to the loop_ input of the "DF Model to GeoJSON" component.

description:
Create an Fourth Generation Loop for a District Energy Simulation (DES) simulation.
_
This includes a central hot and chilled water plant for the district.
-
code:
try:  # import the core honeybee dependencies
    from honeybee.typing import clean_ep_string
except ImportError as e:
    raise ImportError('\nFailed to import honeybee:\n\t{}'.format(e))

try:  # import the core dragonfly_energy dependencies
    from dragonfly_energy.des.loop import FourthGenThermalLoop
except ImportError as e:
    raise ImportError('\nFailed to import dragonfly_energy:\n\t{}'.format(e))

try:
    from ladybug_{{cad}}.{{plugin}} import turn_off_old_tag
except ImportError as e:
    raise ImportError('\nFailed to import ladybug_{{cad}}:\n\t{}'.format(e))
turn_off_old_tag(ghenv.Component)


# set defaults
name = clean_ep_string(_name_) if _name_ is not None else 'unnamed'
economizer_type = _economizer_type_ if _economizer_type_ is not None else 'None'
heating_type = _heating_type_ if _heating_type_ is not None else 'NaturalGas'

# create the loop
des_loop = FourthGenThermalLoop(
    name, _cooling_plant_, _heating_plant_, economizer_type, heating_type
)
if _name_ is not None:
    des_loop.display_name = _name_

inputs.name: _cooling_plant_
inputs.description:
Optional CoolingPlant object from the "DF Cooling Plant" component
to specify the properties of the cooling plant in the loop. If unspecified,
default cooling plant properties will be used.

inputs.name: _heating_plant_
inputs.description:
Optional HeatingPlant object from the "DF Heating Plant" component
to specify the properties of the heating plant in the loop. If unspecified,
default heating plant properties will be used.

inputs.name: _economizer_type_
inputs.description:
Text for the type of waterside economizer to be used within
the cooling plant. Integrated will pre-cool the inlet supply water
to the chiller using the cooling tower whenever outdoor wetbulb
temperatures are cold enough. NonIntegrated will bypass the chiller
completely to create chilled water via the cooling tower whenever
outdoor wetbulb temperatures are cold enough. Choose from the
options below. (Default: None).
* None
* Integrated
* NonIntegrated

inputs.name: _heating_type_
inputs.description:
Text for the source of heat within the heating plant.
Choose from the options below. (Default: NaturalGas).
* NaturalGas
* Electricity
* AirSourceHeatPump
* DistrictHeating

inputs.name: _name_
inputs.description:
Text to be used for the name and identifier of the Thermal Loop.
If no name is provided, it will be "unnamed".

name: DF Fourth Generation Thermal Loop
